description: A construction manager is breaking down a large part of the project into a smaller, manageable work package to be issued to a field supervisor.

nodes.task_description: Define the scope of the work package (e.g., 'Installation of underground piping on Area 5').

expected_outcome.value: The manager clearly defines the boundaries of the work.

nodes.task_description: Compile all the necessary documents for the package, including drawings, safety procedures, and quality forms.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all the required documentation.

nodes.task_description: Create the work package in the system and issue it to the field supervisor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the formal work package and assigns it to the supervisor.
